description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine change_swsmod_chricn_2, and is implemented by a call to change_swsmod_chricn_2. Use this API to change the value of a character ICON (i.e., an element of the CHRICN array) of the switched shunt model of a specified switched shunt device. The corresponding integer ICON is set to 0. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr = change_swsmod_chricn(ibus, model, j, chdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Switched shunt bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Icon number to change relative to the start of the block of icons assigned to this model (1 for icon(i), 2 for icon(i+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: chdata
parameters.description: New character icon value. (input; blank by default).

error_codes.description: no model at this switched shunt device.
model at this switched shunt is aaa not xxx.
no input ICONs used in model.
ICON number outside of the ICON range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
